typography-module_lg_body-l-regular__dPa5z">Having made its F1 debut in May 2022, the Miami International Autodrome is a temporary circuit, but one designed to have a permanent feel. Set in the Hard Rock Stadium complex in Miami Gardens, home to the NFL’s famous Miami Dolphins franchise, the track is the culmination of a development process that simulated no less than 36 different layouts before settling on a thrilling, 19-turn lap that provides a street circuit vibe, not dissimilar to Melbourne’s Albert Park.</p></div></div></div></details><details name=":R2qn7rrrrncv8kq:" took place in 2022, the Florida race joining its Texan counterpart in Austin to become the second US race on the calendar – and the 11th different American venue to host a round of the Formula 1 world championship.</p></div></div></div></details><details name=":R2qn7rrrrncv8kq:" class="[&[open]_.f1rd-open]:block [&[open]_.f1rd-closed]:hidden border-t-thin [&:first-child]:border-t-0 like?</p><div class="f1rd-open hidden"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="img"><title>Chevron Up</title><path fill="currentColor" max-w-para-lg"><div class="flex flex-col gap-rem-12 md:gap-rem-16 lg:gap-rem-24"><p class="typography-module_body-s-regular__ul7F5 typography-module_md_body-m-regular__d9VRg typography-module_lg_body-l-regular__dPa5z">A street-track spectacular. With the Hard Rock Stadium at its epicentre, the 5.41km layout features 19 corners, three long straights and top speeds of over 350km/h. There are elevation changes too, the main one found between Turns 13 and 16, with the track heading over an exit ramp and under various flyovers across uneven ground. The Turn 14-15 chicane, meanwhile, has an uphill approach, with a crest in the middle, and then drops down on exit.</p></div></div></div></details><details name=":R2qn7rrrrncv8kq:" class="[&[open]_.f1rd-open]:block [&[open]_.f1rd-closed]:hidden border-t-thin [&:first-child]:border-t-0 border-surface-neutral-4" data-f1rd-a7s-click="qanda_interaction" data-f1rd-a7s-context="eyJhY3Rpb25UeXBlIjoib3BlbiIsImNsaWNrVGV4dCI6IldoeSBnbz8ifQ=="><summary class="cursor-pointer list-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden flex justify-between items-center min-h-[72px] py-rem-8"><p class="typography-module_body-m-compact-bold__Y0Jyw">Why go?</p><div class="f1rd-open hidden"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="img"><title>Chevron Up</title><path fill="currentColor" d="m18 14-6-6-6 6 1.4 1.4 4.6-4.6 4.6 4.6z"></path></svg></div><div class="f1rd-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="img"><title>Chevron Dropdown</title><path fill="currentColor" d="m18 9.4-6 6-6-6L7.4 8l4.6 4.6L16.6 8z"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="mb-rem-16 pb-rem-8"><div class="px-px-24 max-w-para-lg"><div class="flex flex-col gap-rem-12 md:gap-rem-16 lg:gap-rem-24"><p class="typography-module_body-s-regular__ul7F5 typography-module_md_body-m-regular__d9VRg typography-module_lg_body-l-regular__dPa5z">The Hard Rock Stadium knows how to put on a show – it has hosted six Super Bowls, two Baseball World Series and numerous rock concerts. Put it at the heart of a track designed to encourage close racing while meeting the highest safety standards and you have a sure-fire winner for spectators. Then there’s Miami itself – famed for its sandy beaches, art deco vibe, vibrant multiculturalism and rich sporting heritage, it’s an essential destination for those visiting the Sunshine State.</p></div></div></div></details><details name=":R2qn7rrrrncv8kq:" class="[&[open]_.f1rd-open]:block [&[open]_.f1rd-closed]:hidden border-t-thin [&:first-child]:border-t-0 border-surface-neutral-4" data-f1rd-a7s-click="qanda_interaction" data-f1rd-a7s-context="eyJhY3Rpb25UeXBlIjoib3BlbiIsImNsaWNrVGV4dCI6IldoZXJlIGlzIHRoZSBiZXN0IHBsYWNlIHRvIHdhdGNoPyJ9"><summary class="cursor-pointer list-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden flex justify-between items-center min-h-[72px] py-rem-8"><p class="typography-module_body-m-compact-bold__Y0Jyw">Where is the best place to watch?</p><div class="f1rd-open hidden"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="img"><title>Chevron Up</title><path fill="currentColor" d="m18 14-6-6-6 6 1.4 1.4 4.6-4.6 4.6 4.6z"></path></svg></div><div class="f1rd-closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="img"><title>Chevron Dropdown</title><path fill="currentColor" d="m18 9.4-6 6-6-6L7.4 8l4.6 4.6L16.6 8z"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="mb-rem-16 pb-rem-8"><div class="px-px-24 max-w-para-lg"><div class="flex flex-col gap-rem-12 md:gap-rem-16 lg:gap-rem-24"><p class="typography-module_body-s-regular__ul7F5 typography-module_md_body-m-regular__d9VRg typography-module_lg_body-l-regular__dPa5z">When viewing a sporting event in a purpose-built stadium, it’s hard to go wrong. Set in the Hard Rock Stadium complex in Miami Gardens, home to the NFL’s famous Miami Dolphins franchise, the track is the culmination of a development process that simulated no less than 36 different layouts before settling on a thrilling, 19-turn lap that provides a street circuit vibe, not dissimilar to Melbourne’s Albert Park.\n\n### When was its first Grand Prix?\n\nThe inaugural Miami Grand Prix took place in 2022, the Florida race joining its Texan counterpart in Austin to become the second US race on the calendar – and the 11th different American venue to host a round of the Formula 1 world championship.\n\n### What's the circuit like?\n\nA street-track spectacular. With the Hard Rock Stadium at its epicentre, the 5.41km layout features 19 corners, three long straights and top speeds of over 350km/h. There are elevation changes too, the main one found between Turns 13 and 16, with the track heading over an exit ramp and under various flyovers across uneven ground. The Turn 14-15 chicane, meanwhile, has an uphill approach, with a crest in the middle, and then drops down on exit.\n\n### Why go?\n\nThe Hard Rock Stadium knows how to put on a show – it has hosted six Super Bowls, two Baseball World Series and numerous rock concerts. Put it at the heart of a track designed to encourage close racing while meeting the highest safety standards and you have a sure-fire winner for spectators. Then there’s Miami itself – famed for its sandy beaches, art deco vibe, vibrant multiculturalism and rich sporting heritage, it’s an essential destination for those visiting the Sunshine State.\n\n### Where is the best place to watch?\n\nWhen viewing a sporting event in a purpose-built stadium, it’s hard to go wrong. In fact, you could walk around the top deck of the Hard Rock Stadium and see every corner of the track – pretty unique. As for the best passing spots, a seat near Turns 1, 11 or 17 should put you in the thick of the action."])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"36:{\"text\":\"Practice 1\",\"value\":\"practice?meeting=1284\u0026session=1\",\"isSessionResult\":true,\"isAvailable\":true,\"editorialSessionType\":\"Practice1\"}\n37:{\"text\":\"Sprint Qualifying\",\"value\":\"sprint-shootout?meeting=1284\",\"isSessionResult\":true,\"isAvailable\":true,\"editorialSessionType\":\"Sprint Shootout\"}\n38:{\"text\":\"Sprint\",\"value\":\"sprint?meeting=1284\",\"isSessionResult\":true,\"isAvailable\":true,\"editorialSessionType\":\"Sprint\"}\n39:{\"text\":\"Qualifying\",\"value\":\"qualifying?meeting=1284\",\"isSessionResult\":true,\"isAvailable\":true,\"editorialSessionType\":\"Qualifying\"}\n3f:{\"public_id\":\"common/f1/2026/mercedes/andant01/2026mercedesandant01right\",\"default_image\":\"common/f1/2026/fallback/driver/2026fallbackdriverright\"}\n40:{\"public_id\":\"common/f1/2026/mercedes/2026mercedeslogowhite\"}\n3e:{\"completionStatusCode\":\"OK\",\"racePoints\":25,\"version\":\"Final\",\"gapToLeader\":\"0\",\"gapToPrevious\":null,\"lapsBehindLeader\":\"0\",\"positionValue\":\"1\",\"positionNumber\":\"1\",\"lapsCompleted\":\"57\",\"raceTime\":\"1:33:19.273\",\"racingNumber\":\"12\",\"constructorSeasonName\":\"Mercedes\",\"driverId\":1161,\"driverFirstName\":\"Kimi\",\"driverLastName\":\"Antonelli\",\"driverShortName\":\"K. Gardens\",\"body\":[{\"heading\":\"When was the Miami International Autodrome built?\",\"content\":\"Having made its F1 debut in May 2022, the Miami International Autodrome is a temporary circuit, but one designed to have a permanent feel. Set in the Hard Rock Stadium complex in Miami Gardens, home to the NFL’s famous Miami Dolphins franchise, the track is the culmination of a development process that simulated no less than 36 different layouts before settling on a thrilling, 19-turn lap that provides a street circuit vibe, not dissimilar to Melbourne’s Albert Park.\"},{\"heading\":\"When was its first Grand Prix?\",\"content\":\"The inaugural Miami Grand Prix took place in 2022, the Florida race joining its Texan counterpart in Austin to become the second US race on the calendar – and the 11th different American venue to host a round of the Formula 1 world championship.\"},{\"heading\":\"What's the circuit like?\",\"content\":\"A street-track spectacular. With the Hard Rock Stadium at its epicentre, the 5.41km layout features 19 corners, three long straights and top speeds of over 350km/h. There are elevation changes too, the main one found between Turns 13 and 16, with the track heading over an exit ramp and under various flyovers across uneven ground. The Turn 14-15 chicane, meanwhile, has an uphill approach, with a crest in the middle, and then drops down on exit.\"},{\"heading\":\"Why go?\",\"content\":\"The Hard Rock Stadium knows how to put on a show – it has hosted six Super Bowls, two Baseball World Series and numerous rock concerts. Put it at the heart of a track designed to encourage close racing while meeting the highest safety standards and you have a sure-fire winner for spectators. Then there’s Miami itself – famed for its sandy beaches, art deco vibe, vibrant multiculturalism and rich sporting heritage, it’s an essential destination for those visiting the Sunshine State.\"},{\"heading\":\"Where is the best place to watch?\",\"content\":\"When viewing a sporting event in a purpose-built stadium, it’s hard to go wrong. In fact, you could walk around the top deck of the Hard Rock Stadium and see every corner of the track – pretty unique. As for the best passing spots, a seat near Turns 1, 11 or 17 should put you in the thick of the action.\"}]},\"raceReview\":{\"raceResults\":[{\"driverTLA\":\"ANT\",\"driverFirstName\":\"Kimi\",\"driverLastName\":\"Antonelli\",\"teamName\":\"Mercedes\",\"positionNumber\":\"1\",\"raceTime\":\"1:33:19.273\",\"teamColourCode\":\"27f4d2\",\"gapToLeader\":\"0\",\"driverNameFormat\":\"FirstNameIsPrimary\"},{\"driverTLA\":\"NOR\",\"driverFirstName\":\"Lando\",\"driverLastName\":\"Norris\",\"teamName\":\"McLaren\",\"positionNumber\":\"2\",\"raceTime\":\"1:33:22.537\",\"teamColourCode\":\"ff8000\",\"gapToLeader\":\"3.264\",\"driverNameFormat\":\"FirstNameIsPrimary\"},{\"driverTLA\":\"PIA\",\"driverFirstName\":\"Oscar\",\"driverLastName\":\"Piastri\",\"teamName\":\"McLaren\",\"positionNumber\":\"3\",\"raceTime\":\"1:33:46.365\",\"teamColourCode\":\"ff8000\",\"gapToLeader\":\"27.092\",\"driverNameFormat\":\"FirstNameIsPrimary\"}]},\"assemblyVideoListByTag\":{\"tags\":[{\"id\":\"F1:Race - Current/Miami\"}],\"videos\":[{\"videoId\":\"1865806734969814144\",\"videoDuration\":\"12:41\",\"videoDurationInSeconds\":761,\"caption\":\"UNHEARD RADIO: The Strategy Behind Kimi Antonelli's Miami Win\",\"description\":\"Go behind-the-scenes with ‪Mercede‬s on the strategy calls that led to Kimi Antonelli's undercut on Lando Norris during the Miami Grand Prix. Text-module_upper__pWFEw\",\"children\":\"About\"}],[\"$\",\"$L85\",null,{\"items\":[{\"id\":\"0\",\"title\":\"When was the Miami International Autodrome built?\",\"content\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"px-px-24 max-w-para-lg\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L86\",null,{\"text\":\"Having made its F1 debut in May 2022, the Miami International Autodrome is a temporary circuit, but one designed to have a permanent feel. Set in the Hard Rock Stadium complex in Miami Gardens, home to the NFL’s famous Miami Dolphins franchise, the track is the culmination of a development process that simulated no less than 36 different layouts before settling on a thrilling, 19-turn lap that provides a street circuit vibe, not dissimilar to Melbourne’s Albert Park.\"}]}]},{\"id\":\"1\",\"title\":\"When was its first Grand Prix?\",\"content\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"px-px-24 max-w-para-lg\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L86\",null,{\"text\":\"The inaugural Miami Grand Prix took place in 2022, the Florida race joining its Texan counterpart in Austin to become the second US race on the calendar – and the 11th different American venue to host a round of the Formula 1 world championship.\"}]}]},{\"id\":\"2\",\"title\":\"What's the circuit like?\",\"content\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"px-px-24 max-w-para-lg\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L86\",null,{\"text\":\"A street-track spectacular. With the Hard Rock Stadium at its epicentre, the 5.41km layout features 19 corners, three long straights and top speeds of over 350km/h. There are elevation changes too, the main one found between Turns 13 and 16, with the track heading over an exit ramp and under various flyovers across uneven ground. The Turn 14-15 chicane, meanwhile, has an uphill approach, with a crest in the middle, and then drops down on exit.\"}]}]},{\"id\":\"3\",\"title\":\"Why go?\",\"content\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"px-px-24 max-w-para-lg\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L86\",null,{\"text\":\"The Hard Rock Stadium knows how to put on a show – it has hosted six Super Bowls, two Baseball World Series and numerous rock concerts. Put it at the heart of a track designed to encourage close racing while meeting the highest safety standards and you have a sure-fire winner for spectators. Then there’s Miami itself – famed for its sandy beaches, art deco vibe, vibrant multiculturalism and rich sporting heritage, it’s an essential destination for those visiting the Sunshine State.\"}]}]},{\"id\":\"4\",\"title\":\"Where is the best place to watch?\",\"content\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"px-px-24 max-w-para-lg\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L86\",null,{\"text\":\"When viewing a sporting event in a purpose-built stadium, it’s hard to go wrong. In fact, you could walk around the top deck of the Hard Rock Stadium and see every corner of the track – pretty unique. As for the best passing spots, a seat near Turns 1, 11 or 17 should put you in the thick of the action.\"}]}]}]}]]}]]}]}]}]}],[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"Container-module_container__0e4ac colors-module_bg_colour-surface-neutral-surface-neutral-3__u3lwa\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"Container-module_inner__UkLYJ\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"flex flex-col py-px-48 lg:py-px-64 gap-px-48 lg:gap-px-64\",\"children\":[[[\"$\",\"h2\",null,{\"className\":\"typography-module_display-2-xl-black__WHPIk Text-module_upper__pWFEw\",\"children\":\"MIAMI\"}],[[\"$\",\"ul\",null,{\"className\":\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-px-8 md:gap-px-16 lg:gap-px-24 items-stretch\",\"data-f1rd-a7s-context\":\"eyJsb2NhdGlvbkluUGFnZSI6IlJhY2UgUHJvbW90aW9uYWwgQXJ0aWNsZXMifQ==\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"li\",null,{\"data-f1rd-a7s-click\":\"promotional_content_click\",\"data-f1rd-a7s-context\":\"\",\"className\":\"DynamicArticleCard-module_card__GNumG DynamicArticleCard-module_overlay__CqnD6 DynamicArticleCard-module_constrained__m-x-r DynamicArticleCard-module_surface-neutral-1__Yj6F6 md:col-span-2\",\"aria-describedby\":\"title:S3:\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"span\",null,{\"className\":\"DynamicArticleCard-module_image__N42Rw\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"img\",null,{\"src\":\"https://media.formula1.com/image/upload/t_16by9Centre/c_fit,w_1584/q_auto/v1740000001/fom-website/campaign/support-promoter/miami/GettyImages-2274343149%20169.webp\",\"alt\":\"MIAMI, FLORIDA -
